_note: Critical connecting link: Arnulf of Metz was his son Ansegisel's father, but Ansegisel was a separate root in the original tree. Without this, the whole Merovingian+antiquity ascent dead-ends at Arnulf instead of flowing into the Carolingian main line (Ansegisel -> Pepin of Herstal -> Charles Martel -> Charlemagne).
